multimedia/mlt++ is now part of this (upstream source makeover), so it has to be deleted (and deinstalled before updating this port... i marked a conflict, hope it's enough)
i think the line in ports/MOVED should be something like this (it could be better):
multimedia/mlt++|multimedia/mlt|2009-06-05|Project reorganization

Patch attached with submission follows:
